fixes.description: Added Strigolactone -> Plant_Height (+1) direct edge as a parallel coherent feed-forward alongside the iter-3 Perception Gate (SL -> D14 -> MAX2 -| BZR_BES).
fixes.reason: Iter-3 JUDGE structural change routed all SL effects through MAX2 -| BZR_BES which inverted the predicted direction of max1/max3/max4 KO (T110/T111/T112), d14 KO (T113), and SL exogenous treatment (T115). The curated sign SL -> Plant_Height (+1, E211) was lost. Re-adding as parallel path restores all 5 signs while keeping the Perception Gate for signaling-mutant specificity.
fixes.biological_justification: Umehara 2008 Nature and Gomez-Roldan 2008 Nature established that strigolactone is a shoot-branching-inhibiting hormone in Arabidopsis (max1/3/4 mutants are branchy). For primary shoot height, max mutants in curated E211 show an overall stature reduction that the direct edge captures. The Perception Gate (D14 + MAX2) remains as the mechanistic layer; the direct edge is the coherent-feed-forward summary of SL -> SMXL678 repressors -> growth-regulatory outputs that are not individually curated in this repository. Motif 1 purity is compromised (hormone has 2 outgoing edges) - this is documented as a deliberate refinement choice, not an oversight.

results.reason: Best-method (RWR) improved from 88.7% to 92.2% (+3.5%). Kappa jumped to 0.85 (almost-perfect Landis-Koch band). Algebraic dropped slightly (-0.9%) due to an extra Plant_Height activator (now 5) diluting some tests via geometric mean, but the net gain on best-method is well over the 0.5% keep-threshold.
